app.bottom.title: This app was designed and developed by @maxxetto
app.title: Raid Calculator
app_features.subtitle: Quick help cards for the main tools in the app. Open the ones you need and keep scrolling for the rest.
app_features.title: App Features
arena.title: Arena Calculator by @maxxetto
boss.tip.auto_advantage: Boss advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
boss.tip.epic: Select boss elements and the minimum victory threshold you are interested in.
boss.tip.epic_premium_friends: With Premium active, 2 Friend slots are unlocked for Epic Boss.
boss.tip.raid_blitz: Select the boss level and elements you want to simulate, plus the milestone you want to reach for the gem cost calculation.
boss.tip.title: Boss tip
buttons.title: Buttons
debug.desc.cyclone_boost: Battle simulation with Cyclone Boost. Every turn from the first, the active knight ATK increases by {cyclone}%, stacking for 5 consecutive turns. From turn 6 onward, the boost stays constant. This mode is always gemmed: 4 gems are spent per knight turn.
debug.desc.drs_pet_bar: Battle simulation with Durable Rock Shield. The effect is applied when the pet casts according to the selected pet bar sequence ({petSkillUsage}) and each recast refreshes the {durationDRS}-turn duration.
debug.desc.durable_rock_shield: Battle simulation with Durable Rock Shield. Every {hitsToDRS} turns, the active knight gains a DEF boost of {durableRockShield} for {durationDRS} turns.
debug.desc.normal: Battle simulation without pet skills. Knights use SPECIAL every {knightToSpecial} turns, while the Boss every {bossToSpecial} turns.
debug.desc.old_simulator: Simulation using the old engine. Knights use SPECIAL every turn from turn 1 and the Boss cannot use SPECIAL.
debug.desc.shatter_shield: Battle simulation with Shatter Shield. At turn {hitsToFirstShatter}, and then every {hitsToNextShatter} turns, the active knight gains a shield of {shatterBaseHp} HP (+{shatterBonusHp} HP if pet element matches).
debug.desc.special_regeneration: Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn.
debug.desc.sr_ew: Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn. Then every {hitsToElementalWeakness} turns, Elemental Weakness is applied to the Boss: -{reductionElementalWeakness} ATK for {durationElementalWeakness} turns.
debug.desc.sr_ew_pet_bar: Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn. Elemental Weakness is applied when the pet casts Special 1 (-{reductionElementalWeakness} ATK for {durationElementalWeakness} boss turns). The numeric EW interval ({hitsToElementalWeakness}) is ignored while pet bar mode is active.
debug.log.line.ew_applied: EW applied: stacks={stacks} (effectiveReduction={reduction}%, dur={dur} bossTurns; miss does NOT tick)
debug.log.line.knight_stun_success: KT#{kt} K#{k} uses stun -> Boss stunned
debug.log.line.sr_active: KT#{turn} SR active -> special ALWAYS from now
debug.log.phrase.old_sim_intro: Old Simulator: knight SPECIAL always from KT#1; boss SPECIAL disabled (fakeEW={fake})
debug.log.phrase.sr_active: SR active -> special ALWAYS from now
debug.log.phrase.sr_ew_intro: SR+EW: SR active from KT#{sr}; EW every {ew} turns after KT#{sr} (stacking EW)
debug.log.phrase.sr_intro: SR: special every turn from KT#{turn} onward
debug.premium_only: Debug mode is available only with Premium.
debug.title: Debug
durations.unavailable:
Timing data is unavailable for this result set.
Run the simulation again to populate this section.
durations.lock:
This section is available with Premium only.
Enable Premium from Home (⭐ icon).
elixirs.limit_free: Free users can add up to 5 elixirs.
elixirs.name: Name
elixirs.tip.body: Elixirs provide a points boost for a limited time and are used in the gem cost calculation to reach the required milestone. They are applied in the same order you add them. Free users can add up to 5 elixirs, while Premium users can select all available elixirs.
elixirs.tip.title: Elixirs tip
elixirs.title: Elixirs inventory
epic.level_missing: Level data not available, please submit statistics.
epic_not_implemented: Epic mode is not implemented yet.
raid_guild.fastest_note: Fastest path distributes simultaneous attacks across up to 5 active bosses and reads HP/kill values from boss tables when available.
raid_guild.force_levels.note: Selected levels must appear in the recommended board for Fastest path.
raid_guild.player_scores.hint: Use one player per line: 1200000, Maxxetto
raid_guild.section.title: Raid guild planner
raid_guild.tip.body: Estimate how many bosses your guild needs to kill to reach a target score. Player score always counts in full, overkill counts, and boss kill bonus is added only when the boss dies.
raid_guild.tip.provisional: Boss HP and kill bonus are loaded from boss tables when available. Missing kill values currently fall back to placeholders: Raid = 10 x level, Blitz = 100 x level.
raid_guild.tip.title: Raid guild planner tip
friend_codes.search_hint: Search by name or friend code...
friend_codes.title: Friend Codes
friends.premium_only: Friends section is available after upgrading to Premium.
insert_knights: Insert the data of your knights below:
knights.import.crop.hint: Adjust image crop percentages (0-100) before selecting the screenshot.
knights.import.crop.invalid: Use values from 0 to 100. Left+Right and Top+Bottom must stay below 100.
knights.import.crop.title: Cropping values
knights.import.failed: Unable to read knight stats from screenshot.
knights.import.preview.empty: Enter at least one knight before applying.
knights.import.preview.hint: Edit the values if needed, then apply.
knights.import.preview.incomplete: Fill all three fields (ATK, DEF, HP) or leave all empty for a knight.
knights.import.preview.title: Review imported knight stats
knights.tip.auto_advantage: Knight advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
knights.tip.body: Enter the knight information: ATK, DEF, HP, stun chance and elements. The image icon imports stats from a screenshot, while the star icon quickly inserts a favorite armor.
knights.tip.title: Knights tip
news.events.empty: No active or recently ended events.
news.events.empty_filtered: No events available in this section right now.
news.events.filter.title: Event view
news.events.progress.none: No tracked rewards yet. Use the checkboxes in the table.
news.events.shop.inventory_hint: Manual values stay saved for this event.
news.events.shop.inventory_subtitle: Enter what you currently have. Checked table rewards are added automatically on top.
news.events.shop.qty_inf_hint: Use 0 to deselect. No event limit.
news.events.shop.search_empty: No shop items match this search.
news.events.shop.subtitle: Select items and quantities to calculate required resources.
news.events.shop.subtitle_selected: {count} selected item(s). Resource totals updated automatically.
news.events.shop.tip.body: Select the shop items you want, set the quantity for each item, and the app will automatically calculate the total resources required grouped by currency.
news.events.shop.tip.title: Shop planner tip
news.events.shop.title: Special Event Shop planner
news.events.tip: Tables are shown while the event is active and remain visible for a short grace period after the end date.

pet.favorites.empty: No favorite pets yet. Star a pet in the Pet Compendium to see it here.
pet.favorites.limit.message: Favorite pets: {count}/{limit}. Premium unlocks up to {premiumLimit} favorite pets.
pet.favorites.limit.reached: You can save up to {limit} favorite pets. You are at {count}/{limit}.
pet.favorites.no_results: No favorite pets match the current search.
pet.favorites.subtitle: Quickly insert your saved pets using the highest tier and highest level available.
pet.favorites.title: Favorite pets
pet.skill.values_hint: Default values are prefilled. Set any numeric value to 0 to disable that skill effect for the simulation.
pet.skill_usage.cycle_special1_then2.des: Uses Special 1, then Special 2, then repeats.
pet.skill_usage.double_special2_then_spe: Starts with Special 2 twice, then always uses Special 1.
pet.skill_usage.special1_only.descriptio: Always fills once and uses Special 1.
pet.skill_usage.special2_only.descriptio: Always fills to Special 2 and uses it.
pet.skill_usage.special2_then_special1.d: Starts with Special 2, then always uses Special 1.
pet.tip.auto_advantage: Pet advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
pet.tip.body: Enter pet ATK, Elemental ATK, Elemental DEF and elements. Select pet skills and pet bar usage.
pet.tip.title: Pet tip
pet.title: Pet
pet_compendium.filter.skill_combo_hint: Pick one or two skills to match pet combos more easily.
pet_compendium.filters.title: Search and filters
pet_compendium.no_results: No pets match the current filters.
pet_compendium.subtitle: Browse pets, filter by rarity, tier or skill, and import the selected pet into the Pet section.
pet_compendium.thanks: Big thanks to Kasper534 for the help gathering all the data.
pet_compendium.tip.body: Search by pet name or skill to find the whole pet family. Cards always open on the highest tier and highest level available. Tap the Tier badge to cycle through the recorded data.
pet_compendium.tip.title: Pet Compendium tip
pet_compendium.title: Pet Compendium
pet_skill.description.cyclone_air_boost: Increases Knight Attack for a limited number of turns.
pet_skill.description.cyclone_earth_boos: Increases Knight Attack for a limited number of turns.
pet_skill.description.death_blow: Makes the next attack a Critical Hit with extra damage.
pet_skill.description.durable_rock_shiel: Increases Knight Defense for a limited number of turns.
pet_skill.description.elemental_weakness: Reduces enemy Attack for a limited number of turns.
pet_skill.description.fortunes_call: Provides a fortune-themed pet support effect.
pet_skill.description.ready_to_crit: Increases Critical Hit chance for the next turns.
pet_skill.description.revenge_strike: Increases Pet Attack to deal higher damage based on knight HP lost.
pet_skill.description.shadow_slash: Increases Pet Attack for a powerful strike.
pet_skill.description.shatter_shield: Summons a shield that absorbs incoming damage.
pet_skill.description.soul_burn: Launches a curse attack that deals damage over multiple turns.
pet_skill.description.special_regenerati: Increases the Special Attack Meter charge rate for multiple turns.
Provides infinite Special Regeneration once triggered.
pet_skill.description.vampiric_attack: Deals flat damage and steals HP from the enemy's lost HP.
premium.error_generic_with_code: Purchase failed. Check store configuration and retry.
premium.error_in_progress: Another purchase is already in progress.
premium.error_network: Network error. Check connection and retry.
premium.error_not_allowed: Purchases not allowed for this account/device.
premium.error_product_unavailable: Product not available. Verify Play product/base plan is active.
premium.error_store_problem: Store problem. Retry in a few minutes.
premium.no_products: No products available. Check store configuration.
premium.not_configured: Premium unavailable: RevenueCat is not configured in this build. Set RC_ANDROID_API_KEY (--dart-define) or revenueCatApiKey in android/key.properties.
premium.purchase_failed_store_hint: Purchase failed. Check tester account and Play product status.
premium.redeem_opened_sheet: A system sheet was opened. After redeeming, come back here and tap Restore.
premium.redeem_store_unavailable: The store is not available on this device/session.
premium.redeem_unsupported: Coupon redemption via store is only supported on Android/iOS.
premium.restore_completed: Restore completed. If you purchased, Premium will enable shortly.
premium.restore_expired: No active subscription to restore. Your previous subscription is expired.
premium.restore_none: No active purchases found for this store account.
premium.status_active: Premium is active on this device/account.
premium.status_inactive: Activate Premium to unlock extra results and Debug.
premium.title: Premium
results.advanced.hint: Open only the panels you need for a deeper breakdown.
results.advanced.title: Advanced Details
results.charts.bulk_frontier.subtitle: Mean points versus points/second across saved setups.
results.charts.bulk_frontier.title: Bulk Frontier
results.charts.knight_incoming.subtitle: Shows how much boss damage each knight absorbs.
results.charts.knight_incoming.title: Incoming Pressure
results.charts.knight_contribution.help: This stacked bar estimates how much of the full knight damage comes from each knight, based on mean normal and special action counts plus the current precomputed damage values.
results.charts.knight_contribution.subti: Estimated share of total knight damage using mean action counts and damage values.
results.charts.knight_contribution.title: Contribution Share
results.charts.knight_outgoing.subtitle: Compare each knight normal, crit and special output.
results.charts.knight_outgoing.title: Outgoing Damage
results.charts.pet_impact.help: This summary uses the tracked average pet attacks, crits and misses from timing data. It estimates direct pet damage only, so it does not try to price in secondary skill effects like buffs or shields.
results.charts.pet_impact.subtitle: Quick view of pet direct damage, average casts and estimated share of the total run score.
results.charts.pet_impact.title: Pet Impact Summary
results.charts.score_range.subtitle: Min, median, mean and max for this simulation set.
results.charts.score_range.title: Score Range
results.charts.timing_breakdown.subtitle: Per-knight action time split across normal, special, stun and miss.
results.charts.timing_breakdown.title: Timing Breakdown
results.charts.survival_pressure.help: Each bar compares survival time against the average run time. A larger loss segment means that knight drops out earlier and is under more defensive pressure.
results.charts.survival_pressure.subtitl: Shows how much of the average run each knight survives before becoming the defensive bottleneck.
results.charts.survival_pressure.title: Survival Pressure
results.bulk.swipe_hint: Swipe left/right to move across setup result pages and this comparison page.
results.bulk.title: Bulk Results
results.cyclone.gem_rule: Always gemmed: 4 gems per knight turn.
results.cyclone.pet_bar_rule: Uses the normal pet bar flow and selected pet skill usage.
results.charts.bulk_percentiles.help: P10 is a conservative low-end outcome, P50 is the median run, and P90 is a strong high-end outcome. This helps distinguish stable setups from swingier ones.
results.charts.bulk_percentiles.subtitle: Compare conservative, typical and high-roll outcomes across setups.
results.charts.bulk_percentiles.title: Bulk Percentile Comparison
results.charts.bulk_range.help: Each setup is one row. Read the four bars as worst run, median run, average run and best run to compare both ceiling and consistency.
results.charts.bulk_range.subtitle: Compare min, median, mean and max across saved setups.
results.charts.bulk_range.title: Bulk Score Range
results.graph_view.body_off: Turn this on to add charts without replacing the tables.
results.graph_view.body_on: Charts are shown alongside the detailed report.
results.graph_view.title: Graph View
results.import.paste: Paste a results export JSON (copied from a Simulation Report).
results.import.tip: You can import reports exported from the Results page to review the same setup/result locally.
results.import.title: Import results
results.knights.title: Knights
results.knight_special_bar.title: Knight special bar
results.pet_ability.drs.refresh_value: Refreshing the cast renews the active duration.
results.pet_ability.skill_driven: Uses the selected pet skills and pet bar sequence.
results.pet_ability.title: Pet ability recap
results.pet_mode.sr_ew_pet_bar: Pet bar: bootstrap with Special 2, then Special 1 applies EW.
results.pet_mode.sr_ew_pet_bar_secondary: EW is triggered by Pet Special 1 after the SR bootstrap phase.
results.pet_mode.sr_pet_bar: Pet bar: Special 2 builds permanent SR stacks.
results.pet_mode.title: Pet & Skills
results.share_tip.body: Use the copy button to export this report as JSON. Another user can import it from Home > Utilities > Import results to review the same report locally.
results.share_tip.title: Share tip
results.shatter.title: Shatter Shield
results.tables_scroll_tip_body: You can scroll or swipe horizontally on the tables to view all data.
run_parameters.tip.bulk: After saving setups, you can use Bulk Simulate to run all saved setups sequentially (up to 3 setups, or up to 5 with Premium).
run_parameters.tip.runs: Simulation count is clamped between 1,000 and 1,000,000 runs, so you can still test both quick checks and very large batches.
run_parameters.tip.title: Run parameters tip
run_parameters.tip.toggles: The ON/OFF buttons enable or disable the knights used in the simulation. In Epic Boss, Premium users can also toggle 2 Friends slots.
setups.bulk.completed: Bulk simulation completed. Bulk results view arrives in the next step.
setups.bulk.need_two: Save at least 2 setups before using Bulk Simulate.
setups.disabled_in_debug: Setups are disabled while Debug is active.
setups.import.paste: Paste a setup export JSON (copied from another device/player).
setups.import.tip: If the target slot is occupied, you will be asked for overwrite confirmation. You can choose a new name before saving.
setups.import.title: Import setup
setups.load.hint: Tap Load to apply a saved setup.
setups.name.hint: Optional. Leave empty to keep no custom name.
setups.name.label: Custom name
setups.name.title: Setup name
setups.no_saved: No saved setups yet. Use "Save setup" in Utilities.
setups.only_raid_blitz: Setups are available only in Raid / Blitz mode.
setups.overwrite.title: Overwrite setup?
setups.save.pick_slot: Choose which slot should store the current setup.
setups.save.title: Save setup
setups.share_tip.body: Use Export to copy a setup JSON and share it with guild members. Use Import on a slot to paste a received setup, review the overwrite confirmation if needed, then choose a name before saving.
setups.share_tip.title: Setups share tip
setups.title: Setups
settings.title: Settings
settings.uas_pet_aware.title: Include pet skill context in Universal Armor Score
settings.saved_results.title: Save last simulation persistently
settings.saved_results.subtitle.on: A new simulation replaces the previously saved results after every restart.
settings.saved_results.subtitle.off: Last results stay only in the current session and are cleared from persistent storage.
shortcuts.menu.title: Quick actions
theme.amoled.hint: Pure black background with theme-colored accents.

ua_planner.bonus.eb.current_and_past: Obtained T20 armor of current and past month
ua_planner.bonus.eb.current_month: Obtained T20 armor of the current month
ua_planner.bonus.headstart.prev_month: Crafted Elite of previous two months
ua_planner.bonus.headstart.prev_two_mont: Crafted Elite+ of previous two months
ua_planner.bonus.title: Monthly bonus checks
ua_planner.craft.title: Monthly craft recap
ua_planner.cycle.elements.title: Cycle elements
ua_planner.cycle.title: UA Cycle
ua_planner.heroic.title: Heroic runs this month
ua_planner.lock.enabled: Planner is locked. Unlock to edit values.
ua_planner.month.hidden.description.coun: Hidden month. Still counted in totals.
ua_planner.month.hidden.description.lock: Hidden month (kept in totals because locked).
ua_planner.month.lock.enabled: Month is locked. Hidden locked months remain counted.
ua_planner.month.lock.enabled.simple: Month is locked. Unlock it to edit this month.
ua_planner.month.tip.body: Toggle buttons enable related monthly sections. Pieces are counted only from selected rows inside the tables (Heroic, Headstart, EB Collection), not from the buttons themselves.
ua_planner.month.tip.title: Month tip
ua_planner.reward.first_blitz.title: First Blitz War rewards
ua_planner.summary.hidden_behavior: Hidden months stay counted in totals. Lock only prevents edits.
ua_planner.summary.monthly_rule: Progress is calculated month by month. Elite requires 10 pieces in the same month, Elite+ requires 20.
ua_planner.summary.title: UA Calendar
ua_planner.tools.import.title: Import planner state
utilities.boss_stats.subtitle: Check the base stats for Raid, Blitz and Epic bosses.
utilities.starmetal_note: Starmetal has advantage against all elements.
utilities.title: Utilities
war.elixirs.tip.body: Elixirs provide a temporary points boost and are used in the war calculation to optimize attacks and estimate the gems needed to reach the selected milestone. Elixirs are applied in the same order in which you add them.
war.elixirs.tip.limit_free: Free users can add up to 5 elixirs. Premium users can select all available war elixirs.
war.elixirs.tip.limit_premium: Premium users can select all available war elixirs.
war.elixirs.tip.title: War elixirs tip
war.mode.toggle.title: Planner mode
war.point_values.base: Base values and boosted values for the currently selected war mode.
war.results.tip.body: Results summarize attacks, energy and gems based on the selected server/toggles and war elixirs. The optimizer automatically finds the best mix between normal attacks and PA when PA is enabled.
war.results.tip.title: War results tip
war.section.title: War calculator
war.tip.calculator: Set the target milestone and available energy, then choose server and toggles (Strip, Frenzy, PA) to simulate the correct war points table.
war.tip.optimizer: When PA is enabled, the calculator searches the best mix between normal attacks and Power Attacks to minimize gem cost for the selected target.
war.tip.title: War tip
war.title: War Calculator by @maxxetto
wargear.favorites.empty: No favorite armors yet. Star an armor in the Wargear Wardrobe to see it here.
wargear.favorites.limit.message: Favorite armors: {count}/{limit}. Premium unlocks up to {premiumLimit} favorite armors.
wargear.favorites.limit.reached: Free users can save up to {limit} favorite armors. You are at {count}/{limit}. Premium unlocks up to {premiumLimit} favorite armors.
wargear.favorites.no_results: No favorite armors match the current search.
wargear.favorites.subtitle: Quickly insert your saved armors using the current role, rank and plus filters.
wargear.favorites.title: Favorite armors
wargear.guild_bonuses.tip: Tap an element to cycle its guild bonus from 0% to 10%. The first armor element uses the ring bonus, the second uses the amulet bonus.
wargear.import.summary: Imported base armor as {name} | {rank} | {role} | {atk} / {def} / {hp} | Pet x{count} (+{bonusAtk} ATK, +{bonusDef} DEF)
wargear.no_results: No armor set matches the current filters.
wargear.plus.subtitle: Shows the stronger + version and imports those stats.
wargear.recalculate.done: {target} recalculated using the current pet bonus and imported armor.
wargear.recalculate.none: No imported armor is available to recalculate for this slot.
wargear.score.subtitle: Scores use the current boss, pet and guild context.
wargear.sort.name: Sort: Name
wargear.subtitle: Browse saved maxed armor sets, filter them quickly, then import the resolved stats and elements into the selected slot.
wargear.thanks: Big thanks to Kasper534 for the help gathering all the data.
wargear.title: Wargear Wardrobe
wargear.universal_scoring.toggle.title: Include pet skill context in UAS
warning.invalid_elixir_config: Some selected elixirs have missing bonus or duration. Please choose only elixirs with valid bonus and duration.
warning.non_friend_knight_required: Please select at least one non-friend knight.
warning.sr_first_knight_pet_match_requir: The first active knight must match at least one pet element.
warning.sr_pet_match_required: To use Special Regeneration, at least one knight must match the pet elements (only needed for the pet effects).
app_features.raid_blitz.title: Raid / Blitz Simulator
app_features.raid_blitz.summary: Run large battle simulations and review score, range, gem cost and detailed knight breakdowns.
app_features.raid_blitz.quick_1: Set Boss, Pet and Knights on the Home screen.
app_features.raid_blitz.quick_2: Choose the number of simulations and active knights.
app_features.raid_blitz.quick_3: Press Simulate to open the full report.
app_features.graph_view.title: Graph View & Charts
app_features.graph_view.summary: Turn on Graph View inside results pages to add charts alongside the full tables, including score range, distribution, threshold chance, bulk compare charts and other visual summaries.
app_features.graph_view.quick_1: Open a Raid / Blitz results page or a Bulk compare page.
app_features.graph_view.quick_2: Enable Graph View when the toggle is available.
app_features.graph_view.quick_3: Use the charts to compare score shape, thresholds, timing pressure and setup tradeoffs faster.
app_features.debug_log.title: Debug Battle Log
app_features.debug_log.summary: Replay one deterministic battle with a turn-by-turn log, live search and log copy.
app_features.debug_log.quick_1: Enable Debug from the quick actions menu.
app_features.debug_log.quick_3: Search the log or copy it for troubleshooting.
app_features.pet_tools.title: Pet Tools
app_features.pet_tools.summary: Manage pet stats, elements, selected skills, custom skill values and pet bar usage.
app_features.pet_tools.quick_1: Set pet ATK, Elemental ATK, Elemental DEF and elements.
app_features.pet_tools.quick_2: Choose Skill Slot 1, Skill Slot 2 and pet bar order.
app_features.pet_tools.quick_3: Adjust skill numbers when you want custom testing.
app_features.pet_compendium.title: Pet Compendium
app_features.pet_compendium.summary: Browse pet families, filter by rarity and skill, then import the selected pet directly into the Home setup.
app_features.pet_compendium.quick_2: Search by pet name, skill or family tag.
app_features.pet_compendium.quick_3: Pick tier, level and skill set, then tap Use pet.
app_features.knight_ocr.title: Knight OCR Import
app_features.knight_ocr.summary: Import ATK, DEF and HP for all three knights from a screenshot with crop controls and a review step.
app_features.knight_ocr.quick_1: Tap the image icon in the Knights section.
app_features.knight_ocr.quick_2: Adjust the crop values and choose your screenshot.
app_features.knight_ocr.quick_3: Review the detected numbers before applying them.
app_features.wargear_wardrobe.title: Wargear Wardrobe
app_features.wargear_wardrobe.summary: Import maxed armor sets with filters for elements, role, guild rank, guild element bonuses and Base / + version, including special UA and Starmetal outliers.
app_features.wargear_wardrobe.quick_1: Open Utilities > Wargear Wardrobe or the star inside a slot.
app_features.wargear_wardrobe.quick_2: Filter armor by role, rank, elements, version and guild element bonuses.
app_features.wargear_wardrobe.quick_3: Tap Use armor to import stats into the selected slot.
app_features.universal_score.title: Universal Armor Score
app_features.universal_score.summary: Compare favorite armors with a fast contextual score based on the current boss, pet setup, knight slot and resolved armor stats.
app_features.universal_score.quick_1: Set the current boss and pet on the Home screen.
app_features.universal_score.quick_2: Open the star inside a knight slot to browse favorite armors.
app_features.universal_score.quick_3: Sort by score, compare the shown values and import the armor you want.
app_features.boss_stats.title: Boss Stats Lookup
app_features.boss_stats.summary: Check the base ATK, DEF and HP tables for Raid, Blitz and Epic Boss in one place.
app_features.boss_stats.quick_2: Switch between Raid, Blitz and Epic.
app_features.boss_stats.quick_3: Read the level table you need before simulating or sharing a setup.
app_features.setups_bulk.title: Setups and Bulk Simulate
app_features.setups_bulk.summary: Save your Raid / Blitz builds, reload them later, share them with others and compare multiple setups in one batch.
app_features.setups_bulk.quick_1: Save a setup from Utilities > Save setup.
app_features.setups_bulk.quick_2: Open Setups from the top quick actions menu to load, rename, export or import.
app_features.setups_bulk.quick_3: Use Bulk Simulate once you have at least two saved setups.
app_features.war_calculator.title: War Calculator
app_features.war_calculator.summary: Plan attacks, Power Attacks, energy and gems for War milestones with EU / Global, Strip, Frenzy and elixir support.
app_features.war_calculator.quick_3: Set server, toggles and PA strategy to read the final plan.
app_features.ua_planner.title: UA Planner
app_features.ua_planner.summary: Track monthly UA progress, event rewards, placements and bonus conditions with export and import support.
app_features.ua_planner.quick_2: Enable the events you are playing that month.
app_features.ua_planner.quick_3: Enter score and placement values to see Elite and Elite+ progress.
app_features.news_shop.title: News and Event Shop
app_features.news_shop.summary: Follow event schedules, track completed rows and calculate required shop currencies from your selected items.
app_features.news_shop.quick_2: Switch between Active, Ended and Upcoming events.
app_features.news_shop.quick_3: Use the event shop planner to total the currencies you still need.
raid_guild.selected_levels.note: Add player nicknames and average scores per boss level. The optimizer will keep those players on their selected levels.
raid_guild.player.empty: No players added for this level yet.
raid_guild.player.name: Nickname
app_features.epic_simulator.title: Epic Simulator
app_features.epic_simulator.summary: Simulate Epic Boss runs and review results with the dedicated Epic flow.
app_features.epic_simulator.quick_1: Open the Epic flow from the main Raid setup.
app_features.epic_simulator.quick_2: Set your knights, pet and Epic boss context.
app_features.epic_simulator.quick_3: Run the simulation to review the Epic results page.
app_features.epic_simulator.premium: With Premium: unlock friend slots in Epic setups.
app_features.pet_compendium.premium: With Premium: unlock the full favorites and advanced pet workflow.
app_features.wargear_wardrobe.premium: With Premium: unlock favorite armor shortcuts and contextual score-assisted comparison.
app_features.wardrobe_simulate.title: Wardrobe Simulate
app_features.wardrobe_simulate.summary: Use the real Raid / Blitz simulator on every 3-armor setup generated from your top 5 favorite armors ranked by Universal Armor Score, then review the top 5 setups by mean damage.
app_features.wardrobe_simulate.quick_1: Set the current boss, pet and simulation count on the Home screen.
app_features.wardrobe_simulate.quick_2: Save at least 5 favorite armors that match your current Wardrobe filters.
app_features.wardrobe_simulate.quick_3: Press Wardrobe Simulate to compare the generated setups and review the final ranking report.
wardrobe_simulate.title: Wardrobe Simulate
wardrobe_simulate.confirm.body: This will simulate the top 5 favorite armors matching the current saved Wardrobe filters across all favorite pets.
wardrobe_simulate.needs_five: Wardrobe Simulate needs at least 5 favorite armors matching the current Wardrobe filters.
wardrobe_simulate.needs_pet_favorites: Wardrobe Simulate needs at least 1 favorite pet saved in Pet Compendium.
wardrobe_simulate.report.subtitle: Favorite armors are re-ranked for each favorite pet, then expanded into all 3-armor setups, slot permutations and primary/secondary permutations using the current Raid/Blitz context.
wardrobe_simulate.report.pet_note: Top armor candidates are recalculated separately for each favorite pet.
results.charts.bulk_head_to_head.title: Head-to-Head Delta
results.charts.bulk_head_to_head.subtitl: Direct comparison of the two selected setups across score, consistency and efficiency signals.
results.charts.bulk_head_to_head.help: Each row compares the same metric between the two setups. Bars point toward the setup with the stronger value, while the side labels keep the exact numbers visible.
results.charts.bulk_head_to_head.selecto: Choose the two setups to compare directly.
results.charts.bulk_thresholds.help: Each setup shows approximate chances to finish at or above four practical score cutoffs: the current selected score, its own mean, P75 and P90.
results.charts.bulk_thresholds.subtitle: Compact chance view for each setup at the current target, mean, P75 and P90 thresholds.
results.charts.bulk_thresholds.title: Bulk Threshold Chips
results.charts.bulk_distribution.help: Each mini histogram shows how the setup scores are distributed across the simulation. Compare spread, skew and concentration without overlapping the setups into a single noisy chart.
results.charts.bulk_distribution.subtitl: Small multiples make the score shape of each setup easier to compare at a glance.
results.charts.bulk_distribution.title: Bulk Distribution
wardrobe_simulate.report.role_note: Role filter is ignored here on purpose, because Wardrobe Simulate tests all valid 1 primary + 2 secondary role assignments.
wardrobe_simulate.report.no_valid: No valid setup was generated from the current favorite armors.
wargear.filters.title: Filters
wargear.modifiers.title: Modifiers
app_features.armor_badges.title: Imported Armor Badges
app_features.armor_badges.summary: Imported armor cards on the Raid Home screen show tappable badges for role, guild rank and version, so you can cycle them and recalculate stats instantly.
app_features.armor_badges.quick_1: Import an armor into a knight or friend slot from Wargear Wardrobe.
app_features.armor_badges.quick_2: Tap the Role, Rank or Version badge on the Home card.
app_features.armor_badges.quick_3: Each tap cycles the badge and recalculates the imported armor stats.
home.faq.title: FAQ
home.faq.subtitle: A few quick answers about the app, the developer and where to reach out.
home.faq.q1.question: Are you the sole developer of this app?
home.faq.q1.answer: Yes. I designed and developed the app myself, with modern development tools helping speed up parts of the workflow.
home.faq.q2.question: Which server do you play on?
home.faq.q2.answer: I play on the Global server.
home.faq.q3.question: What guild / family are you part of?
home.faq.q3.answer: I am part of Imperial Knights, the top guild in the Imperial Family.
home.faq.q4.question: Do you welcome feedback on newly released features?
home.faq.q4.answer: Absolutely. I always appreciate feedback and new feature proposals, so feel free to contact me on LINE, Discord, or by email at kedraidcalcsupp@gmail.com.
results.charts.convergence.subtitle: Sampled checkpoint score points with overall mean, median, min and max guides.
results.charts.convergence.title: Score Plot
results.charts.bulk_frontier.help: Each point is one saved setup. Farther right means higher average score, higher up means better score efficiency over time.
results.charts.convergence.help: Plots one sampled score point per checkpoint across the run count. The dashed purple line is the final mean, the dashed fuchsia line is the final median, the blue line is the final min, the red line is the final max, and the shaded band spans the same min/max range.
results.charts.histogram.help: Each bar is a score bucket. Colors show three percentile zones: below 40%, from 40% to 60%, and above 60%.
results.charts.histogram.subtitle: How often each score range appears across all runs.
results.charts.histogram.title: Score Distribution
results.charts.knight_incoming.help: Shows incoming boss damage per knight. Longer bars mean that knight is under more pressure and needs more survivability.
results.charts.knight_outgoing.help: Compares each knight normal, crit and special damage against the boss. Longer bars mean higher outgoing damage.
results.charts.score_range.help: Shows the spread of outcomes from the worst run to the best run. Read it from left to right as min, median, mean and max.
results.charts.timing_breakdown.help: Each row is one knight. The full bar is that knight total action time, split into normal, special, stun and miss segments.
results.charts.exceedance.help: Use this graph to see how often a run clears realistic score cutoffs such as mean, median, P75 or P90. It is derived from histogram buckets, so it remains an approximation.
results.charts.exceedance.subtitle: Approximate chance to finish at or above practical score thresholds for a single run.
results.charts.exceedance.title: Score Threshold Chance
results.charts.bulk_target.help: Uses histogram buckets from each setup simulation to estimate how likely that setup is to hit the current milestone target.
results.charts.bulk_target.subtitle: Approximate chance for each setup to reach the current target score.
results.charts.bulk_target.title: Bulk Target Chance
durations.summary_hint: All values are averaged per run. Read top cards first, then open each knight card.
results.advanced.elixirs_hint: Estimated score gain per selected elixir.
results.advanced.pet_details_hint: Quick snapshot of pet damage profile and active loadout.
results.advanced.timing_hint: Run pacing, survival pressure and per-action timing.
results.charts.bulk_time_efficiency.help: Higher values indicate faster score generation in practice. Use this alongside score range to balance speed and consistency.
results.charts.bulk_time_efficiency.subt: Ranks setups by points generated per second.
results.charts.bulk_timing.help: Run time mean estimates total fight length. Lowest knight survival highlights the first defensive collapse point. Looking at both together helps identify stable and fast setups.
results.charts.bulk_timing.subtitle: Compares average run duration and defensive survivability across setups.
results.charts.bulk_timing.title: Bulk Timing Snapshot
results.charts.knight_efficiency.help: Useful for comparing setups quickly: higher values indicate better point throughput for the same action time budget.
results.charts.knight_efficiency.subtitl: Estimated score generated per second of knight action time.
results.charts.knight_efficiency.title: Knight Efficiency (Points / Own Second)
results.charts.knight_time_share.help: Use Histogram to compare Survival and Lost seconds side by side. Use Pie to see share distribution per knight.
results.charts.knight_time_share.subtitl: Compare survival share and lost-time share across knights.
results.charts.knight_time_share.title: Knight Survival vs Time Loss
results.charts.run_pacing.help: This stacked bar shows who owns the timeline in an average run. Large boss share means stronger incoming pressure; larger knight share usually means more offensive uptime.
results.charts.run_pacing.subtitle: Shows how average run time is distributed between boss and knight turns.
results.charts.run_pacing.title: Run Pacing Mix
results.pet.skills.behavior.category_bos: Applies a boss ATK debuff while active.
results.pet.skills.behavior.category_shi: Creates a shield that absorbs incoming damage.
results.pet.skills.behavior.cyclone: Applies cyclone damage boost during the cyclone phase.
results.pet.skills.behavior.drs: Boosts knight DEF while the shield buff is active.
results.pet.skills.behavior.elemental_we: Reduces boss ATK for the configured number of boss turns.
results.pet.skills.behavior.fallback: Uses the imported effect values shown in this row.
results.pet.skills.behavior.shatter: Adds shatter shield HP (base + bonus) when triggered.
results.pet.skills.behavior.special_rege: Builds or boosts knight special meter to accelerate SPECIAL turns.
results.pet.skills.cadence.s1_never: Not used in this pet bar setup.
results.pet.skills.cadence.s2_never: Not used in this pet bar setup.
